creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to xxjack12xx from comment #10)

The patch you approved (attachment 163575) adds the dependencies to BUILD_DEPENDS, not using DOCS_BUILD_DEPENDS as Rainers patch does (attachment 163484)

If Rainers patch is complete and correct, you can just approve it (in a comment: "I approve attachment 163484")

Your previous comment 4 is what is confusing. If Rainers patch already adds DOCS_BUILD_DEPENDS, why was a new patch needed?

Please clarify.
